visuals.title: The fork-exec-wait Cycle
visuals.description: Visual diagram for The fork-exec-wait Cycle
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">fork and exec Functions</text>

  <!-- Parent Process -->
  <rect x="160" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parent Process
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- fork() arrow -->
  <path d="M210,110 L210,150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="220" y="135" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    fork()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Child Process -->
  <rect x="160" y="160" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Child Process
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- exec() arrow -->
  <path d="M210,210 L210,250" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="220" y="235" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    exec()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- New Program -->
  <rect x="160" y="260" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="285" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    New Program
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>
